steps.title: Identify what unifies the two sculptures
steps.content: Both Uros Island and Fortuna are LED light sculptures created by Grimanesa Amoros—that's the defining similarity. The notes mention their different physical forms (smooth domes vs. entangled tubes) and vastly different sizes, but these are differences, not similarities.

steps.title: Find the choice that emphasizes the unifying features
steps.content: D accomplishes the goal through parallel structure: “Uros Island is an LED light sculpture made by Grimanesa Amoros, as is Fortuna“ emphasizes that both sculptures share the same defining features. The other three highlight differences between them or address only one sculpture—neither accomplishing the stated goal. That matches choice D — D is correct.
